text: I feel anticipation walking through these polished, modern spaces. The glass and clean lines evoke a sense of order and focus. Entering the vibrant, intellectually-charged R+D space, I am intrigued by the invitation to reflect on the evolving relationship between humanity and technology. Here, curiosity stirs within me, and I am eager to ponder how we connect and shape the future with these machines. There is an undercurrent of excitement in being present at this crossroads between creation and contemplation.
